description: Blends two IMAGE tensors using Photoshop-style blend modes (normal, multiply, screen, overlay, soft_light, hard_light, difference, add, subtract, dodge, burn). image_b is automatically resized to match image_a's resolution if they differ. The alpha parameter controls how much of the blended result is mixed back with the original image_a (0 = only image_a, 1 = fully blended).
